---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ELIS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's missing today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Which layer does this affect?

- [ ] Discovery (Scout, Analyzer)
- [ ] Design (Designer, UXer, Animator)
- [ ] Build (Builder, Tester)
- [ ] Backend (Supabase)
- [ ] Deploy (Deployer)
- [ ] Business (Stripe, Launcher)
- [ ] Orchestrator (ELIS conductor)
- [ ] Other / New layer

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
